catalog.shortDescription: Control who may enter your realm. Define access across your entire guild.
catalog.longDescription: Gates allow you to create on-chain access lists that can be applied across your guild, modules, or specific actions. They are the foundation of permission and exclusivity.
catalog.userCostsInfo: Viewing member lists is free. There are no transaction costs for members; the guild pays for list creation and on-chain storage.

docs.overview: The Gates module allows you to define who can access your systems. It acts as your guild's permission layer.
docs.mechanics:
Each gate = on-chain wallet list

Can be applied to: Entire guild, Specific modules, Individual actions

Integrates with: Marketplace, Raffles, Discord roles, Shipments
docs.setup:
Create a gate

Add wallet addresses

Assign gate to modules or actions
docs.pricing:
50 USDC per gate list

On-chain storage cost per wallet slot (reclaimable)

activationInstructions.intro: Decide who may enter your halls. Forge your access scroll and seal it on-chain.
steps: Choose where the gate applies (global, module, transaction)
activationInstructions.note: Module is active immediately; billing is per list when you create one.
